relationships.type: dependency — constructor parameter, stored as protected readonly field

componentSpecs.name: BaseRepository
componentSpecs.description: Abstract generic repository class in src/shared/base.repository.ts. Accepts a Knex instance via constructor (import type { Knex } from 'knex') and stores it as protected readonly knex: Knex. Declares abstract CRUD method signatures: findById, findAll, create, update, delete. Concrete repository implementations in domain modules extend this class and use this.knex for query building. The Knex type is imported directly from the knex package (knex@^3.1.0). No project-owned wrapper interface is needed. The Knex instance itself is deferred to a later phase; only the type is resolved now.
